adapter_response.query:
/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.6.17", "profile_name": "lakehouse", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "test.lakehouse.source_unique_bronze_customers_customer_id.bb9be4420a"} */
select
      count(*) as failures,
      count(*) != 0 as should_warn,
      count(*) != 0 as should_error
    from (
      
    
    

select
    customer_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from bronze.sales.customers
where customer_id is not null
group by customer_id
having count(*) > 1



      
    ) dbt_internal_test

/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.6.17", "profile_name": "lakehouse", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "test.lakehouse.source_unique_bronze_products_product_id.b19aa87d0c"} */
select
      count(*) as failures,
      count(*) != 0 as should_warn,
      count(*) != 0 as should_error
    from (
      
    
    

select
    product_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from bronze.sales.products
where product_id is not null
group by product_id
having count(*) > 1



      
    ) dbt_internal_test
